allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['case_id','question','context','ground_truth'] if k in d}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k,''\) for k in ['case_id','question','context','ground_truth']}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
